subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hello Bob,

Thanks for following up. I’d be happy to help get a meeting on the calendar to discuss a potential partnership.

We can offer the following meeting windows:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If any of those work, send over your preferred time within one of the windows and we can coordinate the call.

I’m not able to share direct internal contact details or internal directory information, but I’m happy to help coordinate through this email thread.

Best regards,
